flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Foothill College rose 26% between 2007 and 2010 ($711 → $894).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Foothill College rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 ($10.8k → $12.6k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Foothill College rose 121% between 2007 and 2010 (7.7k → 17.1k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Foothill College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.7% → 0.0%).
